ABOUT

JMR Visuals

Designer & 3D Artist

A multidisciplinary designer specializing in print, 3D, and motion design. Based in Barcelona, working globally.

With over a decade of experience crafting visual identities, editorial layouts, and immersive 3D experiences, I bridge the gap between traditional design craft and emerging technologies. My work spans brand systems, exhibition design, motion graphics, and real-time 3D applications.

I believe design is a conversation between form and function — where every pixel, every curve, and every interaction serves a purpose. Whether it's a printed monograph that lives on a shelf for decades or a WebGL experience that exists only in the browser, the same principles apply: clarity, intention, and craft.

“Design is not just what it looks like. Design is how it works.”

hello@jmrvisuals.com

Get in Touch

Have a project in mind? Let's talk about it.
